title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.110 - Ventilation
text:
292.110.  Ventilation. — All manufacturing, mechanical, mercantile and other establishments in this state shall be so ventilated as to render harmless all impurities, as near as may be.
(RSMo 1939 § 10192) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13232; 1919 § 6796; 1909 § 7837
